title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ninjacart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!
